distribution.description:
**COLUMN DESCRIPTORS**

**Identity & Geography**
| Column | Description |
|---|---|
| `country_code` | ISO3 country code |
| `iso3` | ISO3 country code (reference copy) |
| `country_name` | Standard World Bank country name |
| `year` | Reference year (2000–2023) |
| `region` | World Bank regional classification (7 regions) |
| `income_group` | Low / Lower-Middle / Upper-Middle / High income |
| `lending_type` | World Bank lending classification |
| `capital_city` | Capital city name |
| `latitude` / `longitude` | Country centroid coordinates |

**World Bank Indicators**
| Column | Description | Coverage |
|---|---|---|
| `undernourishment_pct` | Prevalence of undernourishment % | 73.6% |
| `food_production_index` | Food production index (2014–2016=100) | 85.4% |
| `crop_production_index` | Crop production index (2014–2016=100) | 85.4% |
| `cereal_yield_kg_per_ha` | Cereal yield in kg per hectare | 82.1% |
| `agricultural_land_pct` | Agricultural land % of total land | 96.0% |
| `arable_land_pct` | Arable land % of land area | 94.2% |
| `employment_in_agriculture_pct` | Employment in agriculture % | 86.1% |
| `freshwater_withdrawal_pct` | Annual freshwater withdrawals % of resources | 75.9% |
| `gdp_per_capita_usd` | GDP per capita current USD | 96.8% |
| `inflation_consumer_prices_pct` | Annual consumer price inflation % | 83.4% |
| `population_total` | Total population | 100.0% |
| `child_mortality_per_1000` | Under-5 mortality per 1,000 live births | 90.3% |
| `poverty_headcount_pct` | Population below $2.15/day % | 35.0% |
| `stunting_prevalence_pct` | Stunting in children under 5 % | 16.2% |
| `food_imports_pct_merchandise` | Food imports % of merchandise imports | 81.6% |

**FAO FAOSTAT Indicators**
| Column | Description | Coverage |
|---|---|---|
| `fao_undernourishment_pct` | Prevalence of undernourishment % (3yr avg) | 50.1% |
| `fao_food_deficit_kcal_per_day` | Depth of food deficit kcal/capita/day | — |
| `fao_dietary_energy_adequacy_pct` | Dietary energy supply adequacy % | 70.5% |
| `fao_protein_supply_g_per_day` | Protein supply g/capita/day | 68.2% |
| `fao_animal_protein_g_per_day` | Animal protein supply g/capita/day | 68.2% |
| `fao_fat_supply_g_per_day` | Fat supply g/capita/day | 68.2% |
| `fao_min_dietary_energy_req_kcal` | Minimum dietary energy requirement kcal | 84.8% |
| `fao_child_stunting_pct` | Children under 5 stunted % | 70.0% |
| `fao_child_stunting_millions` | Children under 5 stunted (millions) | 35.7% |
| `fao_child_wasting_millions` | Children under 5 wasted (millions) | 6.5% |
| `fao_low_birthweight_millions` | Newborns with low birthweight (millions) | 15.3% |
| `fao_mod_severe_food_insecure_millions` | Moderately/severely food insecure (millions) | 19.0% |
| `fao_severe_food_insecure_millions` | Severely food insecure (millions) | 14.9% |
| `fao_severe_food_insecurity_pct` | Severe food insecurity prevalence % | 19.8% |
| `fao_cereal_import_dependency_pct` | Cereal import dependency % | 67.0% |
| `fao_basic_water_access_pct` | Population with basic water access % | 81.1% |
| `fao_basic_sanitation_pct` | Population with basic sanitation % | 81.3% |
| `fao_safe_water_pct` | Population with safely managed water % | 53.1% |
| `fao_gdp_per_capita_ppp` | GDP per capita PPP constant 2021 int$ | 82.7% |

keywords: subject > earth and nature > environment > agriculture
subject > people and society > social science > economics
name: Global Food Security Intelligence
description:
# Global Food Security Intelligence

**217 countries · 57 indicators · hunger, production & crisis signals**

## Dataset Overview

Everyone is talking AI. But you can't eat AI.

While the world races to build the next large language model, 733 million people go to bed hungry every night. This dataset exists because the real intelligence crisis isn't artificial — it's agricultural.

Built from two of the world's most authoritative public data sources — the World Bank World Development Indicators and the FAO FAOSTAT Food Security Suite — this is a production-grade, analysis-ready dataset covering 217 countries across 24 years (2000–2023). It brings together 57 indicators spanning hunger prevalence, food production, child malnutrition, protein supply, water access, economic vulnerability, and more — merged, cleaned, and enriched with composite derived metrics.

What makes this different: Most food security datasets on Kaggle are single-source, single-topic, or outdated. This one crosses World Bank macroeconomic data with FAO nutrition and food systems data, giving you the full picture — from cereal yield per hectare to the depth of caloric deficit per capita per day. On top of the raw indicators, I have engineered a Hunger Severity Index, an Economic Vulnerability Index, a Food Crisis Flag (IPC Phase 3+ proxy), and year-on-year undernourishment trend tracking — all at the country-year level.

438 country-years are flagged as active food crises. Congo DRC, Haiti, Somalia, Madagascar, Liberia — every single year from 2000 to 2023. The data tells the story better than any headline.

## Data Science Applications

- Supervised ML — Predict food crisis onset from lagged economic and production signals
- Time-series forecasting — Model undernourishment trends by country and region
- Clustering — Identify typologies of food vulnerability across income groups and geographies
- Geospatial analysis — Lat/lon coordinates included for every country for mapping
- Causal inference — Isolate the effect of inflation shocks, conflict, or drought on hunger outcomes
- SDG tracking — Monitor progress toward UN Sustainable Development Goal 2: Zero Hunger
- Cross-domain research — Combine with climate, conflict, or trade datasets for richer analysis

## Column Descriptors

**Identity and Geography**

| Column | Description |
|---|---|
| country_code | ISO3 country code |
| country_name | Standard World Bank country name |
| year | Reference year 2000 to 2023 |
| region | World Bank regional classification |
| income_group | Low / Lower-Middle / Upper-Middle / High income |
| capital_city | Capital city name |
| latitude / longitude | Country centroid coordinates |

**World Bank Indicators**

| Column | Description | Coverage |
|---|---|---|
| undernourishment_pct | Prevalence of undernourishment % | 73.6% |
| food_production_index | Food production index 2014-2016=100 | 85.4% |
| crop_production_index | Crop production index 2014-2016=100 | 85.4% |
| cereal_yield_kg_per_ha | Cereal yield kg per hectare | 82.1% |
| agricultural_land_pct | Agricultural land % of total land | 96.0% |
| arable_land_pct | Arable land % of land area | 94.2% |
| employment_in_agriculture_pct | Employment in agriculture % | 86.1% |
| freshwater_withdrawal_pct | Annual freshwater withdrawals % | 75.9% |
| gdp_per_capita_usd | GDP per capita current USD | 96.8% |
| inflation_consumer_prices_pct | Annual consumer price inflation % | 83.4% |
| population_total | Total population | 100.0% |
| child_mortality_per_1000 | Under-5 mortality per 1000 live births | 90.3% |
| poverty_headcount_pct | Population below $2.15 per day % | 35.0% |
| food_imports_pct_merchandise | Food imports % of merchandise imports | 81.6% |

**FAO FAOSTAT Indicators**

| Column | Description | Coverage |
|---|---|---|
| fao_undernourishment_pct | Prevalence of undernourishment % 3yr avg | 50.1% |
| fao_dietary_energy_adequacy_pct | Dietary energy supply adequacy % | 70.5% |
| fao_protein_supply_g_per_day | Protein supply g per capita per day | 68.2% |
| fao_animal_protein_g_per_day | Animal protein supply g per capita per day | 68.2% |
| fao_fat_supply_g_per_day | Fat supply g per capita per day | 68.2% |
| fao_min_dietary_energy_req_kcal | Minimum dietary energy requirement kcal | 84.8% |
| fao_child_stunting_pct | Children under 5 stunted % | 70.0% |
| fao_child_stunting_millions | Children under 5 stunted millions | 35.7% |
| fao_severe_food_insecurity_pct | Severe food insecurity prevalence % | 19.8% |
| fao_cereal_import_dependency_pct | Cereal import dependency % | 67.0% |
| fao_basic_water_access_pct | Population with basic water access % | 81.1% |
| fao_basic_sanitation_pct | Population with basic sanitation % | 81.3% |
| fao_gdp_per_capita_ppp | GDP per capita PPP constant 2021 | 82.7% |

**Derived Metrics**

| Column | Description | Coverage |
|---|---|---|
| hunger_severity_index | Composite hunger severity score 0 to 100 | 100.0% |
| economic_vulnerability_index | Composite economic risk score 0 to 100 | 100.0% |
| food_crisis_flag | Binary crisis flag 1 equals active crisis | 100.0% |
| undernourished_pop_millions | Estimated undernourished population millions | 74.4% |
| food_crop_production_gap | Gap between food and crop production indices | 85.4% |
| protein_adequacy_score | Protein supply vs WHO 52g per day baseline | 68.2% |
| agriculture_dependence_index | Combined agri employment and land score | 100.0% |
| undernourishment_yoy_change_pp | Year on year undernourishment change pp | 70.3% |
| row_completeness_pct | Key indicator columns populated per row % | 100.0% |

## Provenance

Sources

World Bank World Development Indicators — REST API, accessed April 2026. 15 macroeconomic and agricultural indicators across all sovereign nations.

FAO FAOSTAT Food Security Suite — Bulk normalized download, accessed April 2026. 19 nutrition, food systems, and food security indicators.

Methodology

Data was pulled programmatically via the World Bank WDI REST API and FAO FAOSTAT bulk download endpoint. World Bank records were filtered to sovereign nations only using ISO3 country codes from the WB country metadata endpoint. FAO data was filtered to Value rows only, excluding confidence interval bounds, with rolling 3-year window years resolved to their midpoint year. FAO country names were harmonized to World Bank naming conventions via a manual override dictionary covering approximately 35 known mismatches. Both sources were merged on country name and year into a single country-year panel. Derived composite metrics were engineered using min-max normalization across the full dataset. No synthetic imputation was applied — missing values reflect genuine gaps in national statistical reporting.

## Acknowledgements

Dataset cover image generated using Nano Banana Pro. Data sourced from the World Bank World Development Indicators (CC BY 4.0) and FAO FAOSTAT (CC BY-NC-SA 3.0 IGO).
